subcodes.title: Address to women's gathering at Krug home in New York, 1912-11-19
subcodes.first_line: Undoubtedly you must be happy; if you are not happy, then who should be happy?... In all the former dispensations, men were considered superior to women.
subcodes.subjects: @equality of men and women, @role and station of women, @call to action, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @prophecy and fulfillment
